reasoning: Commercial banks are actively trimming MBS holdings while the Fed continues QT at $35bn/month through at least October 2025 (search_0_summary, search_1_summary). This creates strong downward pressure in the near term. Probability increases with time horizon as uncertainty grows about when QT ends and whether policy changes alter bank behavior. The 0.28 for 2025-11-02 reflects high likelihood of continued decline; 0.33 for 2025-11-25 allows for slight possibility of stabilization; 0.42 for 2026-01-24 acknowledges that 3 months provides time for potential policy shifts, though downward pressure remains dominant.
